During the assessment we observed the following request:

GET /oauth/callback?code=synthetic-auth-code&state=synthetic-state-value&token=<REDACTED:query.secret> HTTP/1.1
Host: callback.example.test
Authorization: Bearer <REDACTED:authorization.bearer>
Cookie: session=<REDACTED:cookie.value>; theme=dark
X-API-Key: <REDACTED:header.secret>

The token parameter above is interesting. Also note:
https://example.test/?sig=<REDACTED:query.secret>&signature=<REDACTED:query.secret>
